/home/tathuan/.espressif/tools/riscv32-esp-elf/esp-15.2.0_20251204/riscv32-esp-elf/bin/riscv32-esp-elf-g++ @"/home/tathuan/Project_B/usb_serial_jtag_echo/build/toolchain/cxxflags" @"/home/tathuan/Project_B/usb_serial_jtag_echo/build/toolchain/ldflags" -Wl,--cref -Wl,--defsym=IDF_TARGET_ESP32C3=0 -Wl,--Map=/home/tathuan/Project_B/usb_serial_jtag_echo/build/usb_serial_jtag_echo.map -Wl,--no-warn-rwx-segments -Wl,--orphan-handling=error -fno-lto -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--warn-common -T rom.api.ld -T esp32c3.peripherals.ld -T esp32c3.rom.ld -T esp32c3.rom.api.ld -T esp32c3.rom.bt_funcs.ld -T esp32c3.rom.libgcc.ld -T esp32c3.rom.version.ld -T esp32c3.rom.ble_master.ld -T esp32c3.rom.ble_50.ld -T esp32c3.rom.ble_smp.ld -T esp32c3.rom.ble_dtm.ld -T esp32c3.rom.ble_test.ld -T esp32c3.rom.ble_scan.ld -T esp32c3.rom.eco3.ld -T esp32c3.rom.eco3_bt_funcs.ld -T esp32c3.rom.libc.ld -T memory.ld -T sections.ld CMakeFiles/usb_serial_jtag_echo.elf.dir/project_elf_src_esp32c3.c.obj -o usb_serial_jtag_echo.elf   -L/home/tathuan/esp-idf/components/riscv/ld  -L/home/tathuan/esp-idf/components/soc/esp32c3/ld  -L/home/tathuan/esp-idf/components/esp_rom/esp32c3/ld  -L/home/tathuan/Project_B/usb_serial_jtag_echo/build/esp-idf/esp_system/ld -Wl,--wrap=__gxx_personality_v0 -Wl,--wrap=__cxa_throw -Wl,--wrap=__cxa_allocate_exception -lstdc++ esp-idf/pthread/libpthread.a esp-idf/esp_libc/libesp_libc.a -u __cxa_guard_dummy -u __cxx_init_dummy -lgcc esp-idf/cxx/libcxx.a -u __cxx_fatal_exception
